Description

URL - https://fes-ext.pre.private.defra.gov.uk/create-catch-certificate/privacy-notice

Page title - Privacy Notice – Create a UK catch certificate 

User journey - Journey 1, Step 3

Issue

Visually styled headings such as ‘Performance Statistics’ and ‘Performance information’ are used to introduce sub‑sections of content on the page. However, these elements have not been marked up programmatically as headings. They are currently implemented as standard <p> elements.

This results in an accessibility failure because screen reader users rely on semantic headings to understand, identify, and navigate the page structure. Users would reasonably expect that visually prominent sub‑section headings would also be marked up as programmatic headings, maintaining consistency between visual hierarchy and semantic structure.

image-20260325-172652.png
 

Change

Update visually styled headings so they are correctly marked up using appropriate heading tags (e.g. <h3>), allowing screen reader users to understand the same hierarchy and structure as sighted users.

Text

Current style

Changed style

Performance Statistics:

 

 

Paragraph 

H3

Performance information:

Paragraph 

H3

Company insights:

Paragraph 

H3

Acceptance Criteria 

Headings updated from <p> to <h3>follow a logical, hierarchical order consistent with the rest of the page structure.
